title: bocagea coriacea
intro: Bocagea coriacea, also known as the "Bocagea coriacea plant" or "Tournesol", is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, Bocagea coriacea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
